rationale: Hard pass: a Goku/Ultra Instinct anime transformation hook has zero connection to Push'em All's stickman crowd-pushing loop, and using licensed DBZ IP creates serious legal/ASA takedown risk that outweighs any CTR upside. The palette overlaps loosely on blue, but the anime rendering style clashes with the game's flat minimalist 3D, and while shonen fans skew casual-mobile, they expect RPG/gacha combat — bounce/uninstall rates would be brutal. Skip this archetype; if the team wants the "transformation" emotional beat, recreate it natively with the in-game "SIZE UP!" power-up moment instead.
